response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the Reference JSON lyrics for 'Diva' (climax section) and 'Dancing Reed' perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for both songs. Manual transcription and translation were required for the closing talk section since it was partially truncated in the reference. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to vocal cord activation. Aggressive end-time truncation used for rapid transitions in the songs to prevent cascading delays. Included visual titles for both song performances.

subtitles.original: [曲：Diva]
subtitles.english: [Song: Diva]

subtitles.original: 行き止まりばっか足が竦んで立てないよ
subtitles.english: I'm blocked, my feet tremble and I can't stand

subtitles.original: 音のない世界から君を見つけて連れ出すんだ
subtitles.english: I'll find you in a soundless world and take you out

subtitles.original: 言葉紡いで唄うことがわたしの運命だ
subtitles.english: Singing by weaving words is my destiny

subtitles.original: 世界にありふれた虚しささえも上書きして
subtitles.english: Overwriting the common emptiness in the world

subtitles.original: 路地裏に咲いた花のように
subtitles.english: Like a flower blooming in a back alley

subtitles.original: 願いを照らす小さな光に憧れて
subtitles.english: Longing for a small light to illuminate my wish

subtitles.original: 君の歌姫になれたらいいな
subtitles.english: I wish I could be your diva

subtitles.original: [曲：Dancing Reed]
subtitles.english: [Song: Dancing Reed]

subtitles.original: Okey Dokey 返事はいいけど冗談なら笑えないよ
subtitles.english: Okey dokey, a reply is fine but jokes aren't funny

subtitles.original: 渋滞 曖昧 どっちを向いちゃうの
subtitles.english: Stuck in traffic or unsure, which way will you go?

subtitles.original: 蜃気楼に手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: I stretched my hand out towards a mirage

subtitles.original: 微熱のような夢物語
subtitles.english: A feverish, dreamlike tale

subtitles.original: そんな光は見ない振りしていた
subtitles.english: I pretended not to see that kind of light

subtitles.original: ざわめく鼓動 まだ行かないで
subtitles.english: My restless heartbeat, don’t leave yet

subtitles.original: 幻じゃ嫌だよ
subtitles.english: I don’t want it to be an illusion

subtitles.original: 私を奪って
subtitles.english: Take me away

subtitles.original: 魅惑のDancing Dancing night
subtitles.english: Alluring dancing, dancing night

subtitles.original: 拡がって収まんない Universe
subtitles.english: Expanding, unstoppable universe

subtitles.original: 君の表情は 私の森羅万象を
subtitles.english: Your expression might rewrite my entire world,

subtitles.original: 書き換えちゃうかも 責任重大ね
subtitles.english: it's a big responsibility

subtitles.original: 一切合切
subtitles.english: Anything and everything

subtitles.original: Dance Dance Dance We Are Dancing Reed
subtitles.english: Dance Dance Dance We Are Dancing Reed

subtitles.original: 夢中になって絡み合った ゼログラビティ
subtitles.english: Excited and entangled in zero gravity

subtitles.original: 構わず
subtitles.english: Not caring

subtitles.original: Dance Dance Dance Just a Dance Just a Dance
subtitles.english: Dance Dance Dance Just a Dance Just a Dance

subtitles.original: 声は闇に預けたまま
subtitles.english: Leaving my voice to the darkness

subtitles.original: 目を覚ましても離れないで
subtitles.english: Even if you open your eyes, don’t leave me

subtitles.original: Maybe Needy 正気じゃないのよ
subtitles.english: Maybe needy, I’m not in my right mind

subtitles.original: 体温が忘れられない
subtitles.english: I won’t forget your body heat

subtitles.original: 誰 彼 そんなじゃないから
subtitles.english: That’s not the case for everyone

subtitles.original: 独り占めしてEuphoria
subtitles.english: Monopolizing you, euphoria

subtitles.original: 気にしてない様な 言葉は装飾で
subtitles.english: Words that seem like I don’t care are decoration

subtitles.original: メイクの様には流せない
subtitles.english: It can’t be wiped away like makeup

subtitles.original: 360°偽りだって
subtitles.english: Even if it’s 360° lies

subtitles.original: Crazy Crazy Love
subtitles.english: Crazy Crazy Love

subtitles.english: Take me away from the skyscrapers

subtitles.original: みんなー！今日は誕生日ライブに来てくれてありがとー！
